summary: YouTube is a platform dedicated to giving everyone a voice and showcasing diverse stories from around the world. It fosters community engagement through sharing and listening, emphasizing the importance of individual expression and connection.

sub_pages.title: About YouTube - YouTube
sub_pages.content_snippet:
About YouTube
Our mission is to give everyone a voice and show them the world.
We believe that everyone deserves to have a voice, and that the world is a better place when we listen, share and build community through our stories.
